title: In São Paulo-SP, the Airspace Control Center spotted a UFO on the radar [1991]

text_preview: APRIL 24th, 1991. Time: 20:00. Duration: 50 minutes. In São Roque region, in São Paulo-SP, a military in duty at the DTCEA-SRO, São Roque Airspace Control Department, reported an unrecognized “target” on the radar, an unidentified flying object. According to the report, the UFO was “7NM from the position of the Zone Axis of the G-6 78”, and it was moving at low speed, “almost stopped”. The detection was also witnessed by 6 more people at the Airspace Control in São Roque. According to the witness, there was “recording video coverage [at] São Roque”. Complementary data from COMDABRA [Brazilian
summary: Military personnel at São Roque Airspace Control Center detected a radar target moving at Mach 1-3 on Apr 24, 1991; the target was intermittent and unconfirmed visually by nearby aircraft.
